title: Unfortunately Yours
author: Tessa Bailey
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "Unfortunately Yours" book by Tessa Bailey?
Options:
A. What a polite gesture that was. He briefly became gentle, holding the side of her face in his hand. I am adding it to my wedding promises. I will not be wounded. It is set in stone now, just as the rest are. He passionately kissed her and took one final glimpse of her face. I am so crazy about you. With that, he leapt from the truck with the backpack over one shoulder, leaving her dazed, her heart rupturing intensely. But instincts took over a second later and Natalie moved into the warm spot his body had left, watching him through the windshield, the scrape of the wiper blades abruptly becoming the soundtrack to a scary movie.
B. He was so kind to her. He briefly became gentle, holding her face in his hand. I'm adding it to my wedding promises. I won't be harmed. It's set in stone now, just like the rest of them. He passionately kissed her and took one final look at her face. My goodness, I am absolutely infatuated with you. With that, he leapt from the truck with the backpack over one shoulder, leaving her stunned, her heart aching intensely. But instinct took over a second later and Natalie moved into the warm area left by his body, watching him through the windshield, the scrape of the wiper blades abruptly becoming the soundtrack to a scary movie.
C. How polite of him. And he momentarily softened, cupping the side of her face. Im adding it to my wedding vows. I wont get hurt. Its written in stone now, just like the rest of them. He kissed her hard and took one last look at her face. My God, I am fucking crazy about you. With that, he shot from the truck with the backpack over one shoulder, leaving her reeling, her heart bleeding profusely. But instinct kicked in a second later and Natalie moved into the warm spot left behind by his body, watching him through the windshield, the scrape of the wiper blades suddenly becoming the soundtrack to a horror film.
D. How thoughtful he was. For a moment he softened, cupping her cheek. I'll include it in my marriage vows. I won't get injured. It's permanently recorded now, like everything else. He kissed her fervently and gazed at her face one last time. I am so in love with you. At that, he jumped out of the truck with the backpack over one shoulder, leaving her bewildered, her heart breaking badly. But reflexes kicked in a second later and Natalie shifted into the warm imprint left by him, observing him through the windshield, the scrape of the wipers suddenly the score to a frightening film.
Answer:

It is set in stone now, just as the rest are. He passionately kissed her and took one final glimpse of her face. I am so crazy about you. With that, he leapt from the truck with the backpack over one shoulder, leaving her dazed, her heart rupturing intensely.
